what_is_safe: Review mock data, read worker cards, inspect approval inbox, and run requested validators.
what_is_blocked: No merge, commit, push, autonomous execution, background agents, broker, OANDA, API keys, or live trading.
next_recommended_action: Validate the Command Center and visually confirm it remains compact and display-only.
beginner_note: Start with the Next Safe Action. Open advanced details only when you need more evidence.
